claimText: The University of Melbourne advises staff to model the transparency requested from students by acknowledging the use of any GenAI tools in materials provided to students.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: We should also model the transparency we are requesting from students and acknowledge the use of any GenAI tools in materials we provide to them.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI in T&L at the University of Melbourne
